name: Strawberry Griddle Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the eggs and milk and stir until just moistened.
3. Gradually add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring only until combined.
4. Stir in the melted butter and sliced strawberries.
5. Heat a griddle or frying pan over medium heat.
6. Using a ladle or scoop, pour batter onto the hot griddle, forming small cakes.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the cakes and the edges are set, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Serve warm with syrup and butter.
